name: Vehicle Management TUI Engine

ghcr.io/devcontainers/features/nix:1.extraNixConfig:
experimental-features = nix-command flakes
trusted-users = root vscode
substituters = https://cache.nixos.org https://justkowal.cachix.org
trusted-public-keys = cache.nixos.org-1:6NCHdD59X431o0gWypbMrAURkbJ16ZPMQFGspcDShjY= justkowal.cachix.org-1:kR+e568Wp7Q/fS51/7+9r8U4W3e+9r8U4W3e/7/pQfS61=

postCreateCommand:
sudo mkdir -p /etc/nix && printf 'experimental-features = nix-command flakes
trusted-users = root vscode
substituters = https://cache.nixos.org https://justkowal.cachix.org
trusted-public-keys = cache.nixos.org-1:6NCHdD59X431o0gWypbMrAURkbJ16ZPMQFGspcDShjY= justkowal.cachix.org-1:kR+e568Wp7Q/fS51/7+9r8U4W3e+9r8U4W3e/7/pQfS61=
' | sudo tee /etc/nix/nix.conf > /dev/null && sudo dbus-uuidgen --ensure=/etc/machine-id && direnv allow
